message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with new subsystem tasks and status updates

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect current development state:
new tasks for affinity guards, ghost monitors, resource contracts,
channel primitives, codec equivalence, safety profiles, fault
injection, and scheduler event sequencing. Status updates for
completed and in-progress beads across the conformance and runtime
subsystem epics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
